237 G4DB G4DB_LEG_MOVE (G4DB) Leg Voluntary Movement CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: functional limitation in range of motion in last 7 days - leg - includig hip or knee - voluntary movement.. 0 = No Loss, 1 = Partial Loss, 2 = Full Loss, "-" = Unknown.
238 G4EA G4EA_FOOT_RANGE (G4EA) Foot Range of Motion CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: functional limitation in range of motion in last 7 days - foot -
